title: Crystal PvP Perfect Pack
description: This pack optimizes the Crystal PvP experience. The pack makes your gameplay seemingly more clear and overall, just better. Such optimizations include Low fire, Small totem, Small gapple, No crystal explosions, Customizable enchant glint, and Clear water.
body:
This Minecraft Crystal PvP Resource Pack completely optimizes your overall gameplay. The visiblity and playstyle experienced will be 100x better than vanilla crystal fights. Such tweaks and optimizations include Low fire, Small totem, Small food (more importantly, the gapple), No explosion particles, Customizable enchant glint (scroll down for more), Clear water, amd so much more. I believe this pack is perfect for any crystal player.





**ENCHANT GLINT**
To customize the strength and speed of the enchant glint, follow these steps:
1. Go to the pause menu in Minecraft
2. Click **Options**>**Accessibility Settings**>**Glint Strength/Speed**
3. You can tweak the strength/speed of your enchant glint in these settings.
